top_articles.title: White House Seeks to Slash CISA Funding by $707 Million
top_articles.summary: The Trump administration says the FY2027 budget refocuses CISA on its core mission: protecting federal agencies and critical infrastructure.

top_articles.title: Disgruntled researcher leaks “BlueHammer” Windows zero-day exploit
top_articles.summary: Exploit code has been released for an unpatched Windows privilege escalation flaw reported privately to Microsoft, allowing attackers to gain SYSTEM or elevated administrator permissions.

top_articles.title: Fortinet Rushes Emergency Fixes for Exploited Zero-Day
top_articles.summary: The improper access control bug in FortiClient EMS allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code remotely.

top_articles.title: TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Asian Government Attacks
top_articles.summary: A Chinese threat actor exploited the video conferencing platform to perform reconnaissance, escalate privileges, and execute additional payloads.
